content.en:
After the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor agreed to the Blue Dragon Palace Lord's plan, he began to move the battle towards the Blue Dragon Palace Lord's side.

When he was not far from the Blue Dragon Palace Lord, the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor suddenly wrapped the lord-level forbidden Zerg and moved the void and transferred it to the front of the Blue Dragon Palace Lord.

Suddenly, the Blue Dragon Palace Lord instantly covered the three-headed lord-level forbidden Zerg, while the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor instantly broke away from the battlefield and shuttled towards the position of the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord.

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord did his best to hold back the three-headed lord-level forbidden zerg, making it impossible for them to leave for a short time.

The other side.

The Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor began to join forces with the Vermilion Bird Dao Ancestor to deal with the lord-level forbidden zerg, completely suppressing the other party, but the other party did not panic, after all, even if the Divine Ruin Dao Ancestor was added, there was no way to kill it.

"Shenxu Dao Ancestor, you attack it with all your strength, and use the space to restrain it, don't let it escape!"

The Vermilion Bird Palace Lord said.

"Understood!"

Shenxu Dao Ancestor should answer.

Immediately, the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor continued to attack this lord-level forbidden zerg, and restrained this lord-level forbidden zerg with a spatial forbidden dao technique, so that it was suppressed in this area all the time, unable to escape from here.

Abrupt.

A gray statue is suspended above the head of the Lord of the Vermilion Bird Palace, about the height of a person, as if it is very ordinary, but it can be sacrificed by the Lord of the Vermilion Bird Palace, this must not be an ordinary statue, but a Heavenly Emperor Vessel.

"The Heavenly Emperor Artifact of the Heavenly Emperor Palace-Haohai Statue!"

Shenxu Dao Ancestor said with a solemn expression.

It is rumored that the vast sea ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace has created some Heavenly Emperor Artifacts for the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the materials of the Heavenly Emperor Artifacts are very special, and it takes a long time to refine them, and the preservation method is also relatively energy-consuming.

Therefore, there are not many Heavenly Emperor Weapons in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and the Haohai Statue is one of the Heavenly Emperor Weapons, which has a trace of the power of the Vast Sea Ancestor, and combined with the Dao power of the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord, it is enough to burst out with a terrifying blow.

Even the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor didn't dare to take a hard blow from the Heavenly Emperor's weapon, if there was no special way to block it, then he would also be severely injured or even fall to his death.

At this time.

The lord-level forbidden zerg also sensed the crisis and desperately wanted to escape from here, but was restrained by the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor, and there was no way to escape.

Rumble!!!

The Haohai statue turned into a majestic figure, and under the urging of the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord, he slowly opened his hands and grabbed towards the body of the lord-level forbidden zerg.

The lord-level forbidden zerg looked at the figure, as if he felt the power of the insect king, and his body trembled, but he still tried his best to resist, and one by one his long feet turned into countless afterimages, constantly resisting that pair of majestic palms.

However, all in vain!

Click!

The lord-level forbidden zerg was pinched by the hands of the Haohai statue, and the body continued to crack.

A terrifying trace of the power of the Domain Ancestor was constantly destroying the body of the lord-level forbidden zerg, and it was wearing out its vitality.

"Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor, keep attacking!"

The Vermilion Bird Palace Lord said loudly.

The Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor nodded, no longer hesitated, and cast an attack-type forbidden dao technique, constantly bombarding the body of the lord-level forbidden zerg, giving it damage again and again.

Of course, the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor is only an auxiliary, and the most harmful is the Heavenly Emperor Weapon: the Mighty Sea Statue!

Suddenly, the lord-level forbidden zerg lost its breath and had been pinched to death by the Haohai Statue.

After the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor confirmed, he also stopped attacking.

"Dead!"

The Vermilion Bird Palace Master confirmed that the other party did not cheat to death.

Immediately, he collected the corpse of the lord-level forbidden zerg, and did not immediately lift the Haohai statue.

He was also afraid that the Shenxu Dao Ancestor would snatch the corpse of the lord-level forbidden zerg, and once the Shenxu Dao Ancestor did that, then this Haohai statue that had not yet dispersed would immediately attack the Shenxu Dao Ancestor.

When the corpse of the lord-level forbidden zerg was completely put away by the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord, he lifted the Haohai Statue.

And at this time, Haohai was like it was full of cracks, as if it would shatter at any time.

"It's a pity!"

The Vermilion Bird Palace Lord sighed.

This Heavenly Emperor Weapon can still be used, but it can only be used once or twice, at most it can be used to kill an invincible Dao Ancestor, and it is impossible to kill a half-step Domain Ancestor.

After the Vermilion Bird Palace Master killed a lord-level forbidden zerg, he went to help the Qinglong Palace Lord, while the Shenxu Dao Ancestor went to kill the commander-level forbidden Zerg, as for the Migu Dao Ancestor, he could still insist, but he didn't need his help.

The three-headed lord-level forbidden zerg who was fighting with the lord of the Blue Dragon Palace, seeing the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor hunting the commander-level forbidden zerg, was extremely angry and wanted to stop it.

However, the arrival of the Vermilion Bird Palace Master cut off their hope of leaving.

Their means are too homogeneous, and in the absence of numerical superiority, they can easily be dragged down.

Therefore, the fall of a lord-level forbidden zerg turned their situation around all of a sudden.

In fact, the lord-level forbidden zergs didn't expect that two more half-step domain ancestors would appear in the Dao Mountain Realm, and if they knew, it would be impossible for them to attack the base.

With the passage of time, a commander-level forbidden zerg fell, coupled with the fact that the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor was very fast, and the speed of killing was not slow, more and more forbidden zergs died at his hands.

Abrupt.

The Dao Ancestors of the Divine Ruins incarnated into thousands of people, appearing on one battlefield after another, and instantly killing a large number of forbidden zergs.

At this time, the Forbidden Zerg knew that they had been defeated.

The lord-level forbidden zerg and some wisdom forbidden zergs began to lead the forbidden zerg to retreat and no longer fight.

And in the process of retreating, naturally many taboo zergs were sacrificed.

Ye Tian also kept chasing and killing the forbidden zergs who escaped, and the shadow thorn was too terrifying, almost no taboo zerg could escape, and they died under his shadow thorn one by one.

A few hours later, the Forbidden Zerg army had disappeared, and the Dao Ancestors did not continue to chase and kill.

Subsequently, they began to tidy up the battlefield, cleaning up the corpses of their companions as well as the corpses of the Forbidden Zerg.

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue flew in front of Ye Tian and shouted.

"Are you alright?"

Ye Tian asked with concern.

"It's okay, it's just a little injured, it's not in the way!" Ye Xingchen hurriedly said.

Ye Xingyue also said that she was not injured.

"Let's go, we'll be at the Black Wind Mountain base!"

Ye Tiandao.

Returning to the base of Black Wind Mountain, Ye Tian began to sort out the corpses of the forbidden zerg he had killed.

Among them, there is one commander-level taboo zerg, 116 elite-level taboo zergs, and 2,431 ordinary taboo zergs, such a record is already extremely brilliant, and other supreme Dao ancestors can kill an elite-level taboo zerg, which is already a very awesome record.

Most of the strongest Dao Ancestors can only kill a little ordinary taboo zerg, and an elite-level zerg can't kill them.

There are also many supreme Dao Ancestors who have fallen prey to elite-level forbidden zergs and fallen into the hands of the other party.
